value.0: The Watcher keeps an eye on those who enter the facility, ensuring that all who come do so with intent to use the offered services as intended. One cannot elude the Watcher. It indicates the presence of all, to ensure the safety of patrons and their goods.

Value.value: *The construct's eyes gleam as it examines you.*

value.0: The militia of The Dale are hardy and quick on their feet. Especially trained in defensive tactics, they are known for their tenacity in protecting their village.
This is a settlement guard insignia for the guard templates.
Hoods are lighter than helmets and come in a variety of colors.
Hoods are lighter than helmets and come in a variety of colors.

Belver Underbough, often called "Bell" by friends and clients alike, serves as the Master of Coin for the Hearth and Harvest Treasury. A careful and even-tempered halfling, he oversees the counting halls and vault ledgers with diligence.
A copy of this item (including any crafting you do on it) is used by your Bottled Companion.

Marra Underbough keeps the Hearth and Harvest Treasury in careful order. While she leaves the handling of coin to her husband, she manages the ledgers, schedules, and daily organisation of the counting house. Warm and attentive, she ensures the treasury runs smoothly from one day to the next.
A copy of this item (including any crafting you do on it) is used by your Bottled Companion.

Lysa Underbough is apprenticed to her father at the Hearth and Harvest Treasury. Keen-eyed and eager to learn, she assists with ledgers, tallies, and the careful routines of the treasury, slowly learning the craft of honest bookkeeping and stewardship of coin.
A copy of this item (including any crafting you do on it) is used by your Bottled Companion.
The stout planks of this bench have been worn smooth by years of use.
The stout planks of this bench have been worn smooth by years of use.
Strange runes and pictographs, likely arcane in nature, have been scorched into the sides of this hide-covered strongbox.
